life-transference.canonicalEvidence: One creature of your choice that you can see within range regains a number of hit points equal to twice the necrotic damage you take.
life-transference.structuredState: Effect Type: HEALING; Damage Dice and Damage Type record the self-damage.
life-transference.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only the self Necrotic damage effect and no healing target/effect.
life-transference.issue: Life Transference links a chosen visible target's healing amount to twice the actual self-damage taken, but runtime only applies damage.
life-transference.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked healing fields that can reference actual damage taken by another effect.
life-transference.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linked HEALING effect equal to 2x actual unreduced Necrotic damage taken by caster.

life-transference.canonicalEvidence: One creature of your choice that you can see within range
life-transference.issue: The visible target requirement is represented as lineOfSight.

life-transference.canonicalEvidence: You take 4d8 necrotic damage, which can't be reduced in any way.
life-transference.jsonState: Runtime JSON has the Necrotic damage dice, but no unreducible-damage flag and no caster self-target binding.
life-transference.issue: Life Transference's self-damage cannot be reduced and should be bound to the caster, but runtime does not type either constraint.
life-transference.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damage flag cannotBeReduced and caster self-damage target binding.

life-transference.canonicalEvidence: One creature of your choice that you can see within range regains a number of hit points equal to twice the necrotic damage you take.
life-transference.structuredState: Effect Type: HEALING, but no formula field connects healing to damage actually taken.
life-transference.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no HEALING effect.
life-transference.issue: Life Transference's healing effect and its twice-actual-damage formula are not represented.
life-transference.recommendedTemplateChange: Add healingFormula fields that can reference actual damage taken from a paired effect.
life-transference.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime HEALING effect with formula twice actual self-damage taken.

lightning-arrow.canonicalEvidence: Each creature within 10 feet of the target then makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
lightning-arrow.structuredState: Structured fields only expose one Dexterity save/half row and one 4d8 Lightning damage row.
lightning-arrow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has one immediate 4d8 Lightning DAMAGE effect with Dexterity save half, which conflates the direct attack replacement and secondary burst.
lightning-arrow.issue: Lightning Arrow has two linked damage legs: primary target damage based on attack hit/miss and secondary creatures within 10 feet making Dexterity saves. Runtime flattens this into one save effect.
lightning-arrow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked attack-replacement and secondary burst fields, including hit/miss primary damage, burst radius, secondary save, and separate damage dice.
lightning-arrow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackReplacement damage for 4d8 hit/half-on-miss plus secondary AoE 10-foot Dexterity save 2d8 half.

lightning-arrow.canonicalEvidence: As your attack hits or misses the target, the weapon or ammunition you're using transforms into a lightning bolt. The weapon or ammunition then returns to its normal form.
lightning-arrow.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no weapon/ammunition transformation state.
lightning-arrow.issue: Lightning Arrow temporarily transforms the used weapon or ammunition and then restores it.
lightning-arrow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporaryObjectTransformation fields for weapon/ammunition form change and restoration.
lightning-arrow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime temporaryObjectState data for transforms to lightning bolt and returns to normal form.

lightning-arrow.canonicalEvidence: As your attack hits or misses the target
lightning-arrow.structuredState: Casting Time is bonus_action, but no later attack hit-or-miss trigger is represented.
lightning-arrow.jsonState: Runtime trigger is immediate rather than next ranged attack hit-or-miss.
lightning-arrow.issue: Lightning Arrow's payload triggers from a later attack hit or miss, not immediately when cast.
lightning-arrow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pending attack-trigger fields for next attack hit_or_miss.
lightning-arrow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger data for next ranged weapon/ammunition attack hit or miss.

lightning-arrow.canonicalEvidence: The damage for both effects of the spell increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.
lightning-arrow.structuredState: Scaling Rule 1 records special_text for both effects.
lightning-arrow.jsonState: Runtime has only one damage effect and no typed scaling for both primary and secondary damage legs.
lightning-arrow.issue: Lightning Arrow's higher-slot scaling applies to both linked damage effects, but runtime has only one flattened effect.
lightning-arrow.recommendedTemplateChange: Add multi-effect scaling references so one slot rule can apply to named linked effects.
lightning-arrow.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime scaling to both primary and secondary damage legs.
lightning-arrow.closedReason: Closed by splitting Lightning Arrow into primary 4d8 Lightning and secondary 2d8 Lightning damage legs, adding Secondary Damage structured fields, and recording +1d8 slot-level scaling on both runtime damage effects. The separate pending-attack trigger finding remains open.

lightning-bolt.canonicalEvidence: A stroke of lightning forming a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line blasts out from you in a direction you choose.
lightning-bolt.structuredState: Area Shape and Area Size preserve the line length, but no line width or direction-choice field exists.
lightning-bolt.jsonState: Runtime areaOfEffect preserves Line size 100 but no width or chosen direction field.
lightning-bolt.issue: Lightning Bolt's 5-foot width and caster-chosen line direction are not represented.
lightning-bolt.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaOfEffect.width 5 feet and directionChoice caster_chosen.

lightning-bolt.canonicalEvidence: Each creature in the Line makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
lightning-bolt.structuredState: Save Stat: Dexterity; Save Outcome: half; Damage Dice: 8d6.
lightning-bolt.jsonState: Runtime DAMAGE effect has Dexterity saveEffect half and 8d6 Lightning.
lightning-bolt.issue: The damage save mechanic is represented; line geometry gaps are tracked separately.
lightning-bolt.recommendedTemplateChange: No save/damage field change required for this row.
lightning-bolt.recommendedJsonChange: No save/damage runtime change required for this row.
